data_in.description: Aligned feature table(s) in CSV or tabular format with sample columns and feature rows
MS2 spectra data in MGF or mzML format associated with aligned features

data_out.description: MemoMatrix artifact: a 2D matrix with samples as columns and MS2 fingerprint features (peaks and neutral losses) as rows with occurrence counts
Validation report documenting matrix dimensions, feature cardinality, data type integrity, and comparison to reference outputs

domain_knowledge: MS2 fingerprints are generated by counting the occurrence of MS2 peaks and neutral losses (mass shifts to the precursor ion) present in each sample's spectra.
MEMO operates independently of retention time, allowing comparison of samples acquired under different LC conditions or on different mass spectrometer platforms (e.g., MaXis Q-ToF vs. Q-Exactive).
The MemoMatrix represents sample composition as vectors where each dimension is an MS2 feature (peak or neutral loss) and values are occurrence counts across the sample set.
Aligned feature tables must be pre-processed and linked to their corresponding MS2 spectra data; matchms and spec2vec handle spectral parsing and document conversion internally within memo-ms.

direct_checks: verify file exists: memo package source code at github:mandelbrot-project/memo
verify file_format_is: aligned feature table input (CSV or compatible tabular format)
verify file_format_is: MS2 spectra input (MGF, MSP, or matchms-compatible format)
script_runs: execute memo_from_aligned() function on provided aligned feature table and MS2 spectra without errors

output_matches_reference: resulting MemoMatrix object has structure matching unit test expectations from test_memo_from_aligned and test_memo_from_merged_memo (https://github.com/mandelbrot-project/memo)
field_present: MemoMatrix output contains expected attributes (e.g., matrix data, sample identifiers, feature labels)
value_in_range: MemoMatrix element values fall within valid numeric range (robust to parameter choices in counting thresholds)
verify contains_substring: MemoMatrix metadata or documentation string contains reference to MS2 peaks and neutral losses counting
file_exists: unit test file test_memo_from_aligned in repository at github:mandelbrot-project/memo
expert_review: verify that MemoMatrix fingerprint composition (MS2 peaks and neutral losses) reflects documented counting methodology from changelog v0.1.2
confirm MemoMatrix dimensionality and sparsity are consistent with expected behavior for sample-feature vectorization
assess whether MemoMatrix output is suitable for downstream alignment and comparison tasks as per MEMO use case

finding: MEMO generates MS2 fingerprints by counting the occurrence of MS2 peaks and neutral losses in each sample, which serve as the basis for sample comparison and alignment.
inputs: Aligned feature table(s) in CSV or tabular format with sample columns and feature rows
MS2 spectra data in MGF or mzML format associated with aligned features
methodology_summary: Load and parse aligned feature table(s) and associated MS2 spectra data using matchms-compatible formats.
Extract MS2 peaks and neutral losses from spectra and count their occurrence per sample.
Generate MemoMatrix by organizing occurrence counts into a features-by-samples 2D matrix.
Validate matrix structure (dimensions, data types, feature/sample identifiers) against schema and unit test expectations.

Validation: Confirm MemoMatrix dimensions match input sample and feature cardinality, all entries are non-negative integers, and row/column labels are preserved and match reference outputs from memo_publication_examples.

task_description: Run the memo_from_aligned component on aligned feature tables with associated MS2 spectra to generate a MemoMatrix artifact. Verify the output structure and content conform to documented specifications in the MEMO changelog and unit tests.

task_inputs.label: MS2 spectra in MGF or mzML format

task_objective: Execute memo_from_aligned on a test set of aligned feature tables with MS2 spectra and validate that the output MemoMatrix matches expected structure and content per documented specifications.
title: Reproduce the MemoMatrix produced by memo_from_aligned on the example dataset

Synthesis grounding: the following tools/outputs were NOT found in the source paper and are inferred — verify before use: Python 3.8, numpy, Validation report documenting matrix dimensions, feature cardinality, data type integrity, and comparison to reference outputs.
workflow_description: 1. Load aligned feature tables and corresponding MS2 spectra data files in formats expected by memo-ms (e.g., CSV feature tables and MGF/mzML spectral files). 2. Execute the memo_from_aligned function from the memo-ms package to count MS2 peak and neutral loss occurrences across samples and construct the MemoMatrix. 3. Validate the resulting MemoMatrix artifact for correct dimensions, data types, and presence of expected feature and sample identifiers. 4. Compare matrix structure and content against reference outputs from the memo_publication_examples repository to confirm reproducibility.
